name: Gold Pride - Pedal to the Metal!
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＧＰ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ゴールド・プライド</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－ペダル・トゥ・メタル
desc: Target 1 "Gold Pride" monster you control; until the end of this turn, it gains 500 ATK, it cannot be destroyed by battle or card effects, and it cannot activate its effects. During the End Phase, if a face-up "Gold Pride" monster(s) you control was destroyed by battle or card effect this turn: You can Set this card from your GY. You can only use this effect of "Gold Pride - Pedal to the Metal!" once per turn.
eff: Target 1 "Gold Pride" monster you control; until the end of this turn, it gains 500 ATK, it cannot be destroyed by battle or card effects, and it cannot activate its effects. During the End Phase, if a face-up "Gold Pride" monster(s) you control was destroyed by battle or card effect this turn: You can Set this card from your GY. You can only use this effect of "Gold Pride - Pedal to the Metal!" once per turn.

mst: Prevents other cards being destroyed by card effects
Prevents activation of your Effect Monsters
attack: Prevents other cards being destroyed by battle
